title: Pin third-party actions to a full commit SHA
description: Reference external actions by 40-char commit SHA, not a mutable tag or branch, to stop silent supply-chain swaps.
body: Use when adding or updating any uses: that points outside your org. Do not pin to a floating tag (@v3), a branch (@main), or a short SHA, because a tag can be re-pointed at malicious code after you review it. Actions: replace the tag with the full commit SHA and keep the human-readable version in a trailing comment; enable Dependabot for actions so SHA bumps are reviewed PRs. Validation signals include every external uses: ending in a 40-hex SHA and a lockfile-like audit trail of version comments. Risk boundary: a new third-party action by mutable ref on a workflow with secret or write access is a supply-chain finding; escalate before merge.
